features: Enhanced Gaming Experience: Elevate your gaming with the rhinocables 7-button gaming mouse featuring a USB wired connection, offering a seamless and responsive experience for gaming enthusiasts.

Precision at Your Fingertips: With 7 buttons, including a scroll wheel that acts as a 3rd button, this optical mouse provides precise control. The carefully spaced buttons and a customizable DPI (800/1200/1600/2400) ensure an optimal gaming experience tailored to your preferences.

Durable and Tangle-Free: The mouse cable is protected with a sturdy material braiding, ensuring durability and providing extra protection against wear and tear. Say goodbye to tangled cables and focus on your game.

Comfortable Design: Ergonomically designed for extended gaming sessions, this mouse offers comfort without compromising performance. The thoughtful layout of buttons enhances ease of use, allowing you to concentrate on your game without unnecessary distractions.

Weighted for Superior Feel: Experience a mouse that feels just right in your hand. The weighted metal bottom adds substance to the mouse, providing a satisfying feel during use. Say farewell to lightweight mice and embrace a gaming accessory that enhances your control and precision.
